rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustees Sale
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 29, 2016, line 1. CLAIMANT STANLEY LEE, KITTY LEE MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustees Sale DENIED. Pursuant to CCP 2924k, claim filed on May 14, 2014 and opposition filed on September 1, 2016, FTB has a superior claim to the funds on deposit with the Court. Funds on deposit with the Court in the amount of $40,941, plus interest, if any, accrued thereon, shall be distributed to FTB up to the amount of $59,664.11. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: LALANNE FITNESS LLC ET AL VS. HARRY MING

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA NESTLE ET AL VS. ELIZABETH COURT, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-551022, CGC-16-550504 WITH CASE CGC-16-550151
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 29, 2016, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT BONNIE DONG MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-551022, CGC-16-550504 WITH CASE CGC-16-550151 GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion is GRANTED as to consolidation for discovery and trial (including case management). The motion is denied as to other pre-trial proceedings. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DAWSON VS. PETER ISKANDAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 29, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT PETER ISKANDAR, LEE B. DO LLC. Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint continued to November 10, 2016 for parties to address Baral v. Schnitt (August 1, 2016) 1 Cal. 5th 376. Moving papers shall be filed and served no later than October 13, 2016. Opposition shall be filed and served no later than October 27, 2016. Reply shall be filed and served no later than November 3, 2016. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: YONGNIAN HUANG VS. ANA M. PENADO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 29, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT ANA PENADO, MARTHA VALDEZ-PENADO Notice Of Motion And Motion For Demurrer To Complaint OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. As a general rule judicial decisions are to be given retroactive effect. The circumstances of this case, May 22, 2016 amendment to SFRO and Court's August 31, 2016 ruling, do not warrant application of the exception. =(501/SRB)
